content: أنا مش مستريح في بيته علشان في نفس وحشة
translations: eng:I(m) am not comfortable in his house because there is a bad atmosphere

transcriptions.arabizi: 'ana mish mistirayah fi biyt|uh Aalashaen fi nifs wihsha
